_publications._publicationTitle: Development of the PROMIS pediatric stigma and extension to the PROMIS pediatric stigma: skin item banks.

_contextSnippet: For sample 1, the population with skin conditions, all stigma scores were measured reliably, with IRT-based reliabilities > 0.7...all sample 1 subjects had a reliability ≥ 0.7; moreover, 92.5% of them had a reliability ≥ 0.9
details: IRT-based reliability > 0.7 for all subjects with skin conditions; 92.5% had reliability ≥ 0.9
